title: Support — Anybuild
description: Get help with the Anybuild platform: log issues, describe impact, and we will route your request.

hero.copyHtml: Describe what you are seeing, the environment, and business impact so we can prioritize correctly.

inquiryForm.heading: Support request
inquiryForm.lead: Include steps to reproduce, expected vs actual behaviour, and any error references you have.
inquiryForm.messageLabel: Description, steps to reproduce, and impact
